nodes.title: OpenSpec: process-flow-browser
nodes.description: Execution tracker for openspec/changes/process-flow-browser. Adds a first-class Processes browser (GitNexus execution-flow catalogue) to BeadSpec as a top-level navigation view.

nodes.title: 1.1: Create gitnexus_processes.rs with all types
nodes.description: openspec/changes/process-flow-browser/tasks.md §1.1. Create `src-tauri/src/commands/gitnexus_processes.rs` with types `ProcessSummary`, `ProcessStep`, `ProcessDetail`, `Cluster`, `IssueMatch`, `IndexStatus`, `ReanalyzeHandle` — all deriving `serde::Serialize`, `serde::Deserialize`, and `specta::Type`.

nodes.title: 1.2: Add gitnexus_cli helper with 60s in-process cache
nodes.description: openspec/changes/process-flow-browser/tasks.md §1.2. Add `gitnexus_cli(args: &[&str], ttl_secs: u64) -> Result<serde_json::Value, String>` helper using `once_cell::sync::Lazy<Mutex<HashMap<...>>>` for 60s in-process cache; returns typed `Err` on spawn failure, non-zero exit, or JSON parse failure — never panics.

nodes.title: 1.3: Command list_gitnexus_processes
nodes.description: openspec/changes/process-flow-browser/tasks.md §1.3. Command `list_gitnexus_processes(project_path: String) -> Result<Vec<ProcessSummary>, String>` wrapping `npx gitnexus processes --json`.

nodes.title: 1.4: Command get_gitnexus_process
nodes.description: openspec/changes/process-flow-browser/tasks.md §1.4. Command `get_gitnexus_process(project_path: String, name: String) -> Result<ProcessDetail, String>` wrapping `npx gitnexus process <name> --json`.

nodes.title: 1.5: Command list_gitnexus_clusters
nodes.description: openspec/changes/process-flow-browser/tasks.md §1.5. Command `list_gitnexus_clusters(project_path: String) -> Result<Vec<Cluster>, String>`.

nodes.title: 1.6: Command find_issues_touching_process
nodes.description: openspec/changes/process-flow-browser/tasks.md §1.6. Command `find_issues_touching_process(project_path: String, process_name: String) -> Result<Vec<IssueMatch>, String>` — enumerates open issues with a `branch:` label, calls `get_git_refs_for_issue` per issue, intersects modified-files set with the process's file set, returns top 20 sorted by overlap-count desc.

nodes.title: 1.7: Command get_gitnexus_index_status
nodes.description: openspec/changes/process-flow-browser/tasks.md §1.7. Command `get_gitnexus_index_status(project_path: String) -> Result<IndexStatus, String>` wrapping `npx gitnexus list --json`; parses `last_indexed_at` to compute `age_seconds` and sets `stale = age_seconds > 14400`.

nodes.title: 1.8: Command trigger_gitnexus_reanalyze with Tauri events
nodes.description: openspec/changes/process-flow-browser/tasks.md §1.8. Command `trigger_gitnexus_reanalyze(project_path: String) -> Result<ReanalyzeHandle, String>` spawning `npx gitnexus analyze` as a Tokio background task; emits Tauri events `gitnexus_reanalyze_progress { stage, message }`.

nodes.title: 1.9: Expose gitnexus_processes module in commands/mod.rs
nodes.description: openspec/changes/process-flow-browser/tasks.md §1.9. Expose `gitnexus_processes` module in `src-tauri/src/commands/mod.rs`.

nodes.title: 1.10: Register all six commands in lib.rs
nodes.description: openspec/changes/process-flow-browser/tasks.md §1.10. Register all six commands in `src-tauri/src/lib.rs` in both `tauri::generate_handler!` and `tauri_specta::collect_commands!` alongside existing commands.

nodes.title: 2.1: Unit test for gitnexus_cli caching
nodes.description: openspec/changes/process-flow-browser/tasks.md §2.1. Unit test for `gitnexus_cli` caching: two identical calls within TTL → one process spawn; a third call after TTL expiry → new spawn.

nodes.title: 2.2: Unit test for find_issues_touching_process overlap math
nodes.description: openspec/changes/process-flow-browser/tasks.md §2.2. Unit test for `find_issues_touching_process` overlap math: fixture with 3 issues (2 share a file, 1 does not) → 2 returned sorted by overlap desc; non-overlapping issue excluded.

nodes.title: 2.3: Unit test for JSON parse tolerance
nodes.description: openspec/changes/process-flow-browser/tasks.md §2.3. Unit test for JSON parse tolerance: malformed JSON from gitnexus returns a typed `Err` instead of panicking.

nodes.title: 2.4: Unit test for reanalyze event sequencing
nodes.description: openspec/changes/process-flow-browser/tasks.md §2.4. Unit test for reanalyze event sequencing: command emits `started` then `finished` events on success; emits `error` event on spawn failure.

nodes.title: 2.5: Unit test for IndexStatus.stale threshold
nodes.description: openspec/changes/process-flow-browser/tasks.md §2.5. Unit test for `IndexStatus.stale`: `age_seconds > 14400` → `stale = true`; `age_seconds <= 14400` → `stale = false`.

nodes.title: 3.1: Run specta codegen to regenerate src/bindings.ts
nodes.description: openspec/changes/process-flow-browser/tasks.md §3.1. Run specta codegen (`bun tauri build --debug` or the existing codegen script) to regenerate `src/bindings.ts` with the new types and commands.

nodes.title: 3.2: Add IPC wrappers in src/ipc.ts
nodes.description: openspec/changes/process-flow-browser/tasks.md §3.2. Add wrappers in `src/ipc.ts`: `listGitnexusProcesses`, `getGitnexusProcess`, `listGitnexusClusters`, `findIssuesTouchingProcess`, `getGitnexusIndexStatus`, `triggerGitnexusReanalyze` — following the style of existing wrappers (e.g., `getChangeBeadsProgress`).

nodes.title: 4.1: Extend View union in HashStateContext with 'processes'
nodes.description: openspec/changes/process-flow-browser/tasks.md §4.1. Extend `View` union in `HashStateContext` with `'processes'`; add `processId?: string` field to the hash encoder/decoder; switching active process calls `window.history.replaceState` (not `pushState`).

nodes.title: 4.2: Add Processes entry to ViewSwitcher
nodes.description: openspec/changes/process-flow-browser/tasks.md §4.2. Modify `src/components/layout/ViewSwitcher.tsx` to add `{ id: 'processes', label: 'Processes', description: 'GitNexus execution flows' }` entry; gated on `project != null` only (no OpenSpec feature flag).

nodes.title: 4.3: New ProcessBrowser.tsx two-pane root component
nodes.description: openspec/changes/process-flow-browser/tasks.md §4.3. New `src/components/process-browser/ProcessBrowser.tsx` — two-pane root component; reads `processId` from hash state; parallel-fetches `listGitnexusProcesses` + `listGitnexusClusters` on mount; renders `StaleIndexBanner`, `ProcessList`, and `ProcessDetail`.

nodes.title: 4.4: New ProcessList.tsx with search, cluster filter, virtualised list
nodes.description: openspec/changes/process-flow-browser/tasks.md §4.4. New `ProcessList.tsx` — search input (150ms debounce), cluster `<select>`, virtualized list (TanStack Virtual) grouped by cluster; each row calls `setState`-analogue to update `processId` in hash.

nodes.title: 4.5: New ProcessDetail.tsx with step list and actions
nodes.description: openspec/changes/process-flow-browser/tasks.md §4.5. New `ProcessDetail.tsx` — heading + cluster badge + step count; `[Find issues]` button; `[Open in editor]` button (disabled when no step focused); virtualized stepped list; each step row: step number, symbol, `file:line` (monospace), truncated snippet; `aria-label` per row.

nodes.title: 4.6: New StaleIndexBanner.tsx
nodes.description: openspec/changes/process-flow-browser/tasks.md §4.6. New `StaleIndexBanner.tsx` — conditionally subscribes to `useGitnexusIndexStore` (if `gitnexus-index-freshness-badge` is present) or calls `getGitnexusIndexStatus` on mount; renders banner only when `stale === true`; `Re-analyze` button triggers `triggerGitnexusReanalyze`, subscribes to progress events, shows toast, invalidates `listGitnexusProcesses` query on `finished`.

nodes.title: 4.7: New IssueMatchesPopover.tsx
nodes.description: openspec/changes/process-flow-browser/tasks.md §4.7. New `IssueMatchesPopover.tsx` — opens on `[Find issues]` click; shows spinner while `findIssuesTouchingProcess` resolves; renders up to 20 rows (issue title + overlap count chip); clicking a row calls `setState({ view: 'all', taskId })`; empty-state when no matches.

nodes.title: 4.8: Open-in-editor handler in ProcessDetail.tsx
nodes.description: openspec/changes/process-flow-browser/tasks.md §4.8. Open-in-editor handler in `ProcessDetail.tsx`: constructs `${absoluteFile}:${line}:0` and calls `openPath`; detects `$EDITOR` env var, defaults to `code -g`; on error, shows toast with message.

nodes.title: 4.9: Add view === 'processes' branch in layout/index.tsx
nodes.description: openspec/changes/process-flow-browser/tasks.md §4.9. Add `view === 'processes'` branch in `src/components/layout/index.tsx` rendering `<ProcessBrowser />`, following the same pattern used for `ChangesBrowser`.

nodes.title: 4.10: Accessibility — aria-labels, listbox role, keyboard navigation
nodes.description: openspec/changes/process-flow-browser/tasks.md §4.10. Add `aria-label` on each step row (`"step ${n}: ${symbol} at ${file} line ${line}"`); list role `listbox`; ensure keyboard navigation (arrow keys) moves focus within the step list.

nodes.title: 5.1: cargo test gitnexus_processes::tests passes
nodes.description: openspec/changes/process-flow-browser/tasks.md §5.1. `cargo test -p beadspec_lib gitnexus_processes::tests` passes.

nodes.title: 5.2: bun tsc --noEmit passes after bindings regeneration
nodes.description: openspec/changes/process-flow-browser/tasks.md §5.2. `bun tsc --noEmit` passes after bindings regeneration.

nodes.title: 5.3: Manual — Processes view populates within 2s, filters work
nodes.description: openspec/changes/process-flow-browser/tasks.md §5.3. Manual: open a project, switch to Processes; list populates within 2s, cluster filter narrows results, search filters by substring with 150ms debounce.

nodes.title: 5.4: Manual — detail pane renders steps, Open in editor works
nodes.description: openspec/changes/process-flow-browser/tasks.md §5.4. Manual: click a process; detail pane renders steps with snippet + line; clicking a step focuses it; `Open in editor` opens the file at the correct line.

nodes.title: 5.5: Manual — Find issues popover lists matches, clicking navigates
nodes.description: openspec/changes/process-flow-browser/tasks.md §5.5. Manual: click `Find issues` on a process whose symbol set overlaps a branch with open Beads issues; popover lists matches sorted by overlap desc; clicking a row opens `TaskDetailPanel` on that issue.

nodes.title: 5.6: Manual — stale banner, Re-analyze runs, list refreshes
nodes.description: openspec/changes/process-flow-browser/tasks.md §5.6. Manual: force `age_seconds > 14400`; stale banner renders; clicking `Re-analyze` runs to completion; list refreshes; banner clears.

nodes.title: 5.7: Manual — gitnexus unavailable shows install-hint, no crash
nodes.description: openspec/changes/process-flow-browser/tasks.md §5.7. Manual: simulate `npx gitnexus` unavailable (rename binary); install-hint card renders instead of the list; no crash; other views (Health, OpenSpec, etc.) unaffected.

nodes.title: 5.8: Manual — deep-link hash navigation, replaceState, unknown processId
nodes.description: openspec/changes/process-flow-browser/tasks.md §5.8. Manual: navigate to `#view=processes&processId=<name>` directly; correct process pre-selected on load; switching process updates hash via `replaceState`; unknown `processId` shows list-only (no detail pane).

nodes.title: 5.9: openspec validate process-flow-browser passes
nodes.description: openspec/changes/process-flow-browser/tasks.md §5.9. `openspec validate process-flow-browser` passes.
